title: Unexpected execution result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(10), c2 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES(1, 'test', TRUE);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT PRIMARY KEY, c1 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1) VALUES(2, NULL);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t2 WHERE t2.c1 IS NULL AND t2.c0 = t1.c0);
key_bug_features: SELECT with NOT EXISTS returns incorrect empty result
